dashboard.label: PartnerAPI nginx → hmsguard-ss-qa Upstream Health
dashboard.description: Monitors nginx reverse-proxy errors when forwarding RapidSOS callbacks to hmsguard-ss-qa: "no live upstreams" (502) and "upstream timed out" (110). Use to correlate with K8s pod health, HPA, and DNS. Adjust index/host/sourcetype to match your environment.

search.query: index=* earliest=-24h "no live upstreams" "hmsguard-ss-qa" | stats count as total
index=* earliest=-24h ( "upstream timed out" OR "Connection timed out" ) ( "110" OR "hmsguard" ) | stats count as total
index=* earliest=-24h "no live upstreams" "hmsguard-ss-qa" | timechart span=15m count as "no_live_upstreams"
index=* earliest=-24h ( "upstream timed out" OR "Connection timed out" ) ( "110" OR "hmsguard" ) | timechart span=15m count as "upstream_timeouts"

index=* earliest=-24h "no live upstreams" "hmsguard-ss-qa" | rex "upstream: (?<upstream>[^\s]+)" | eval upstream=coalesce(upstream,"hmsguard-ss-qa") | table _time, host, upstream, _raw | sort -_time | head 50

index=* earliest=-24h ( "upstream timed out" OR "Connection timed out" ) ( "110" OR "hmsguard" ) | rex "upstream: (?<upstream>[^\s]+)" | rex "(?<backend_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+):(?<backend_port>\d+)" | table _time, host, upstream, backend_ip, backend_port, _raw | sort -_time | head 50

panel.title: Backends (IP:port) that timed out – cross-reference with K8s pods

search.query: index=* earliest=-24h ( "upstream timed out" OR "Connection timed out" ) | rex "upstream: (?<upstream_name>[^\s]+)" | rex "(?<backend_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+):(?<backend_port>\d+)" | where isnotnull(backend_ip) AND (upstream_name="hmsguard-ss-qa" OR match(_raw,"hmsguard")) | stats count by backend_ip, backend_port, upstream_name, host | sort -count
index=* earliest=-24h "no live upstreams" "hmsguard-ss-qa" | stats count by host | sort -count
index=* earliest=-24h ( "upstream timed out" OR "Connection timed out" ) ( "110" OR "hmsguard" ) | stats count by host | sort -count
